name: @olilarkin/cdp-wasm
description: CDP (Composers Desktop Project) audio processing programs compiled to WebAssembly, for Node.js and the browser.

scripts.test: node test/catalog.mjs && node test/aiff.mjs && node test/externals.mjs && node scripts/check-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-skill.mjs && node claude-plugin/skills/cdp-sound-design/scripts/smoke.mjs
scripts.docs:build: node docs/tools/build-doc-map.mjs && node docs/tools/harvest.mjs && node docs/tools/render-effect-docs.mjs && node docs/tools/render-generator-docs.mjs
